allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Enable iframe embedding for Zoho Web Tab in Slate

- Add slate.config.json with X-Frame-Options and CSP headers
- Add public/_headers for Netlify-style header config
- Update vite.config.js with frame-ancestors CSP
- Allows embedding in https://*.zoho.com domains

This fixes "refused to connect" error when loading Slate app in Zoho Web Tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
